project: MediaLake Playwright AWS Tag-Based Testing Framework
description: Extend existing Playwright testing infrastructure to discover AWS resources by tags and perform automated CloudFront login testing

1.1_system_design.description: Design architecture for tag-based AWS resource discovery and CloudFront testing integration
1.1_system_design.validation: Architecture documents provide clear integration strategy with existing fixtures
1.1_system_design.scope: ✓ Tag-based resource discovery patterns ✓ CloudFront integration design ✓ Existing fixture extension strategy ✗ Implementation details ✗ Specific code patterns

2.1_aws_resource_discovery.description: Create AWS resource discovery utilities for Cognito pools and CloudFront distributions
2.1_aws_resource_discovery.validation: Utilities can discover tagged AWS resources and integrate with existing fixture patterns
2.1_aws_resource_discovery.scope: ✓ Cognito pool discovery by tags ✓ CloudFront distribution discovery ✓ Tag filtering utilities ✓ AWS SDK integration ✗ Test implementation ✗ UI automation

2.2_enhanced_cognito_fixtures.description: Enhance existing Cognito fixtures to support tag-based pool discovery and no-password-reset user creation
2.2_enhanced_cognito_fixtures.validation: Enhanced fixtures maintain backward compatibility while adding tag-based discovery
2.2_enhanced_cognito_fixtures.scope: ✓ Tag-based Cognito pool discovery ✓ No-password-reset user creation ✓ CloudFront URL discovery ✓ Backward compatibility ✗ Browser automation ✗ Login flow testing

3.1_cloudfront_login_tests.description: Build Playwright test framework for automated CloudFront login testing
3.1_cloudfront_login_tests.validation: Tests can discover resources by tags, create users, and perform login automation
3.1_cloudfront_login_tests.scope: ✓ CloudFront URL discovery and navigation ✓ Automated login flow ✓ Tag-based resource integration ✓ Parallel test safety ✗ Performance testing ✗ Error handling edge cases

3.2_integration_validation.description: Create comprehensive integration tests and validate end-to-end workflow
3.2_integration_validation.validation: Complete end-to-end workflow from tag discovery to login automation works reliably
3.2_integration_validation.scope: ✓ End-to-end workflow validation ✓ Error handling and edge cases ✓ Documentation updates ✓ Backward compatibility verification ✗ Performance optimization ✗ Production deployment

4.1_documentation_update.description: Update documentation and create usage examples for the enhanced testing framework
4.1_documentation_update.validation: Documentation provides clear guidance for using tag-based AWS resource discovery in tests
4.1_documentation_update.scope: ✓ Updated fixture documentation ✓ Usage examples ✓ Migration guide ✓ Troubleshooting guide ✗ Video tutorials ✗ Advanced configuration

success_criteria: Tests can automatically discover Cognito pools with 'Application: medialake' tag
Tests can create users in discovered pools without password reset requirement
Tests can discover CloudFront distributions with matching tags
Tests can navigate to CloudFront URLs and perform automated login
All functionality integrates seamlessly with existing fixture patterns
Parallel test execution remains safe and isolated
Comprehensive documentation and examples are provided
constraints: Must maintain backward compatibility with existing tests
Must follow existing fixture patterns and conventions
Must support parallel test execution safely
Must handle AWS credential configuration gracefully
Must provide clear error messages for missing resources or permissions
